topics.name: board governance
topics.description: How the board oversees organizational strategy, risk appetite, and management performance.

topics.name: governance committees
topics.description: Standing board or management committees (audit, risk, nomination, remuneration) that exercise delegated oversight.

topics.name: delegation of authority
topics.description: How decision-making authority is formally delegated from the board down through management, with limits and escalation thresholds.

topics.name: policies framework
topics.description: The structure that governs how organizational policies are authored, approved, communicated, and kept current.

topics.name: decision rights
topics.description: Who is authorized to make which classes of organizational decisions, and under what conditions.

topics.name: accountability models
topics.description: How responsibility and accountability for outcomes are assigned and tracked across roles (e.g. RACI-style models).
